feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Transport migration cockpit project and objects in S4 Hana public cloud.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

How to transport migration cockpit project and objects from Dev to Qas in S4 Hana public cloud.

Thanks

entry.title: 财务凭证打印
entry.content: hello，工程师，想咨询一下目前在ES版本中，使用APP-科目凭证输出（中国）时，如何打印出A5格式的会计凭证

entry.title: sap blogs
entry.content: Is there an Audit trail available in SAP where I can see the changes made to Bill Plan dates and amounts in Customer Projects? This relates to Professional Services.

entry.title: Workflow triggering based on custom fields in sales order item level
entry.content:
I have created a custom field "Status" in sales order item field in public cloud . I have given three dropdowns , "F" , "P" and "N" in custom field .Based on the certain selected value("F") in the dropdown I have to send the notification to approver (trigger the workflow) . 

I have used the BADI " SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_DEF " to get new dropdown in the manage sales document workflow pre condition and I have used  "SWF_WORKFLOW_CONDITION_EVAL" for the value . I'm not able to trigger the workflow.

Is it possible to trigger the workflow using certain data of the custom field? 

Please help me with this .

Thanks & Regards

Shraddha Nayak

entry.title: SAP_COM_0008
entry.content: "I'd like to ask, why don't I see the option 'SAP_COM_0008' in the drop down menu when creating a New Communication Arrangement?"

entry.title: Business partner screening is not available in Manage Business Partner Master Data
entry.content:
The new field 'Screening Status' is available in the Maintain Business Partner app, but it's not available in the Manage Business Partner Master Data app ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Get the list of "Capital Amount" for supplier
entry.content:
How to get the list of "Capital Amount" for suppliers ?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to update the status of an eDocument?
entry.content: We have incoming eDocuments coming into our eDocument cockpit on S/4HANA Public Cloud edition. However, we do not want to process these documents because we will send these documents via available API to an external system. Since, we will not be posting this document inside S/4HANA, is there a way we can change the status of this document in eDocument cockpit? Not manually but is there a way to automate the change of status, either via API or BAPI or something else.

entry.title: How to link ship-to to an already loaded business partner?
entry.content:
Is there a specific migration file provided by SAP that we could use to link the ship-to to an already loaded business partner ?
 Can the same migration file (customer one) be used to add an additional ship-to partner function to an already loaded business partner ? If so, what the sequence should be ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Standard CDS view as app
entry.content:
Hi,

In public cloud, what is the easiest way to show a stanard CDS view as an app?

I basically want to provide our users the same functionality as the customer data browser app, without giving them access to this app. (and only for a single CDS view)

Best regards,

Kristian

entry.title: Data migration - Automatic mapping in "Migrate your data" app SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

We are currently working on data migration for our customer and we wondered if it is possible to do automatic mapping in the "Migrate your data" app between legacy data and SAP data?

Example: For Purchasing info record migration, the Business Partner Supplier SAP ID is needed in the migration file. Is it possible to perform an automatic mapping of legacy Supplier ID and SAP BP Supplier ID via the Mapping tasks of "Migrate your data" app?

We would like to avoid data mapping errors.

Thank you for you help.

Regards,

Nelly

entry.title: Duplicate Purchase Requisitions
entry.content:
There is a issue. The material has MRP type VB, Reorder point 1, Lot-sizing procedure HB and Maximum stock level 1.

I have run MRP run today and a purchase requisition created with qty 1 with fixed id.

The purchase requisition has been approved and converted into purchase order with qty 1.

The next day after MRP run, there is one more purchase requisition created with qty 1 and md04 available stock showing 2 with both items, which is exceeding maximum stock level.\

Where is the issue?

entry.title: Sales order workflow value help in S4 Hana Public cloud.
entry.content:
What will be the service_path , entity and property for the field(Overall Status) of Sales order to implement the workflow value help badi.

ct_parameter = VALUE #( (

id = 'id_status'

  name = 'Overall Status'

xsd_type = if_swf_flex_ifs_condition_def=>cs_xstype-string

  service_path = ?

  entity = ?

  property = ?

mandatory = abap_true )

Thanks & Regards

Shraddha

entry.title: 3 Decimal places for Data Migration in S4 Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi ALL,

Currently, we are implementing Country Oman - facing an issue with the Data Migration open item as templates allow only 2 decimal places. 

How to change default decimal places in the migration cockpit, I tried with modeler but cannot edit the standard structure.

entry.title: How to Integrate two different Custom Api in eclipse?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to use Custom API : I_BusinessPartnerTP_3 / I_CRDTMBUSINESSPARTNERTP to create Business Partner and Credit Data.

How to build classes to integrate them in eclipse? 

When I update CreditLimitAmount Field, I want to get the information that CreditSegment was created.

If it wasn't created, I should use Create CreditSegment Field first.

Best regards,

Eric

entry.title: renumber gl accounts
entry.content:
We are helping customer to migrate system to S4HC public edition. However, customer has own set of CoA, number range and account group requirements. Since public edition has predefined the chart of accounts and account group assignment, can experts recommend which approach is better in this situation? What is the pros and cons? Any other workaround that can minimize the maintenance effort?

1. disable all predefined GL accounts and renumber them to new accounts

2. create a new set of CoA as alternative CoA

entry.title: g/l account field enquiry
entry.content:
Dear experts,

We are planning to renumber the g/l accounts. But our customer required a reference field to store the previous g/l numbers for reference. Does s4hana cloud public edition have a standard reference field for us to use? Or we need to create custom field?

entry.title: how to handle too much output template requirement in Cloud
entry.content:
This is a consulting requestion, the customer requirement: The customer's sales order output template need based on their different customers' need. This will cause almost 100 sales order template need be create. As there is only tool Adobe live designer could be use in Cloud to change the standard template, it will cause too much time and efforts. 

Is there any other workaround could be adopt?

entry.title: Transfer Stock - In-Plant
entry.content:
To perform the "Transfer Stock - In-Plant" function for inventory transfer.
Which API should I use and which feature should I add in the Communication Arrangements?

entry.title: Select ship to party in outbound delivery creation in subcontracting process
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have the following case:

In the subcontracting process, the supplier have different locations to perform the assembly. 

The supplier of the subcontracting process have assigned a customer with different ship to party partner functions. Each of ship to party customer corresponds to one of the supplier locations.

When we create the outbound delivery to send the components to the supplier, the outbound delivery is created with the customer associated to the supplier as a SHIP TO PARTY of the outbound delivery created.

We want to select the ship to party when we create the outbound delivery to assign the correct delivery address in the outbound delivery.

How can we do it?

Is it possible to do what we need to do in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?

 

Thanks for the support.

 

Best regards
